Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you tried our NEW burger with UNKNOWN ingredients?[n]{f 1 5 0}Plus, now our fries are extra SALTY![n]{f 1 5 0}We await your visit, Wilducklings![n]=========================[n]Secret recipes, mysterious ingredients... Do you have the guts to go Wilduck!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Weekend Wilduck Set is finally HERE! {f 1 3 136}[n]Plus, your free drink that comes with the set will have extra ICE![n]{f 1 5 0}Peck away, Wilducklings![n]=========================[n]Secret recipes, mysterious ingredients... Do you have the guts to go Wilduck!?[n]{f 1 1}
